title: Nostalgic Fry Smoky Treacle Crumble
description: A light and nostalgic Polish dish featuring crispy treacle crumbles fried in a paleo-friendly manner.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the coconut oil and melted dark chocolate if using. Mix well until smooth.
Add caster sugar, golden syrup, and vanilla bean paste to the coconut-oil mixture. Stir thoroughly until all ingredients are fully incorporated and there is no lumps left.
Pour the crumble mixture onto a parchment-lined baking sheet. Using your hands, press it into an even layer about 1cm thick.

Place the baking sheet in the preheated oven for approximately 8 minutes or until the edges turn golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before breaking apart any large clumps of crumble mixture.
